creator: knu@idaemons.org
text:
At Fri, 7 Sep 2001 12:08:30 +0300 (IDT),
Roman Shterenzon wrote:
> >Synopsis:       [UPDATE] xine 0.4.3->0.5.3
(snip)
> The xine now consists of two parts - the lib and the ui.
> The old port can meet Mr.Bullet.

Good job!  But how about just updating xine with xine-ui without
changing the port name, and adding xine-lib as libxine?


Memorandum:
	- Add INSTALLS_SHLIB=yes to the xine-lib port
	- PORTNAME=xine, PKGNAMEPREFIX=lib

> Unfortunately I won't be able to maitain it any longer, please reset maintainer
> in those two ports.

OK.  Thanks for taking care of the port for long!
